Resource Profile: Debt Portal Invoice

Official URL: http://va.gov/fhir/StructureDefinition/DebtPortalInvoice Version: 1.1.467
Active as of 2025-01-04 Computable Name: DebtPortalInvoice

This StructureDefinition contains the maps for VistA file ACCOUNTS RECEIVABLE (430) to Invoice.

​See also the FHIR Shorthand.

Usage:

  • Refer to this Resource Profile: Debt Portal PaymentReconciliation

Formal Views of Profile Content

Description of Profiles, Differentials, Snapshots and how the different presentations work.

  • Differential Table
  • Snapshot Table
  • Statistics/References
  • All
NameFlagsCard.TypeDescription & Constraints
Invoice 0..* Invoice Invoice containing ChargeItems from an Account
dom-2: If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources
dom-3: If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource
dom-4: If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a meta.versionId or a meta.lastUpdated
dom-5: If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label
dom-6: A resource should have narrative for robust management
implicitRules ?!Σ 0..1 uri A set of rules under which this content was created
ele-1: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children
modifierExtension ?! 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored
ele-1: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children
ext-1: Must have either extensions or value[x], not both
identifier SΣ 0..* Identifier Business Identifier for item

status ?!SΣ 1..1 code draft | issued | balanced | cancelled | entered-in-error
Binding: ARBillStatus FHIR (required)
ele-1: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children
subject SΣ 0..1 Reference(Patient) Recipient(s) of goods and services
ele-1: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children
recipient SΣC 0..1 Reference(Debt Portal Patient) Recipient of this invoice
ele-1: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children
dpi-17-1818: 430-9 > 340-.01: if patient then Patient
date SΣ 0..1 dateTime Invoice date / posting date
ele-1: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children
issuer S 0..1 Reference(Organization) Issuing Organization of Invoice
ele-1: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

Constraints

IdGradePath(s)DetailsRequirements
dom-2errorInvoiceIf the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources
: contained.contained.empty()
dom-3errorInvoiceIf the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource
: contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()
dom-4errorInvoiceIf a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a meta.versionId or a meta.lastUpdated
: contained.meta.versionId.empty() and contained.meta.lastUpdated.empty()
dom-5errorInvoiceIf a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label
: contained.meta.security.empty()
dom-6best practiceInvoiceA resource should have narrative for robust management
: text.`div`.exists()
dpi-17-1818warningInvoice.recipient430-9 > 340-.01: if patient then Patient
:
ele-1error**ALL** elementsAll FHIR elements must have a @value or children
: hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())
ext-1error**ALL** extensionsMust have either extensions or value[x], not both
: extension.exists() != value.exists()

This structure is derived from Invoice

NameFlagsCard.TypeDescription & Constraints
Invoice 0..* Invoice Invoice containing ChargeItems from an Account
identifier S 0..* Identifier Business Identifier for item
status S 1..1 code draft | issued | balanced | cancelled | entered-in-error
Binding: ARBillStatus FHIR (required)
subject S 0..1 Reference(Patient) Recipient(s) of goods and services
recipient SC 0..1 Reference(Debt Portal Patient) Recipient of this invoice
dpi-17-1818: 430-9 > 340-.01: if patient then Patient
date S 0..1 dateTime Invoice date / posting date
issuer S 0..1 Reference(Organization) Issuing Organization of Invoice

:
NameFlagsCard.TypeDescription & Constraints
Invoice 0..* Invoice Invoice containing ChargeItems from an Account
id Σ 0..1 id Logical id of this artifact
meta Σ 0..1 Meta Metadata about the resource
implicitRules ?!Σ 0..1 uri A set of rules under which this content was created
language 0..1 code Language of the resource content
Binding: CommonLanguages (preferred): A human language.

Additional BindingsPurpose
AllLanguages Max Binding
text 0..1 Narrative Text summary of the resource, for human interpretation
contained 0..* Resource Contained, inline Resources
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
modifierExtension ?! 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored
identifier SΣ 0..* Identifier Business Identifier for item
status ?!SΣ 1..1 code draft | issued | balanced | cancelled | entered-in-error
Binding: ARBillStatus FHIR (required)
cancelledReason 0..1 string Reason for cancellation of this Invoice
type Σ 0..1 CodeableConcept Type of Invoice
subject SΣ 0..1 Reference(Patient) Recipient(s) of goods and services
recipient SΣC 0..1 Reference(Debt Portal Patient) Recipient of this invoice
dpi-17-1818: 430-9 > 340-.01: if patient then Patient
date SΣ 0..1 dateTime Invoice date / posting date
participant 0..* BackboneElement Participant in creation of this Invoice
id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
role 0..1 CodeableConcept Type of involvement in creation of this Invoice
actor 1..1 Reference(Practitioner | Organization | Patient | PractitionerRole | Device | RelatedPerson) Individual who was involved
issuer S 0..1 Reference(Organization) Issuing Organization of Invoice
account 0..1 Reference(Account) Account that is being balanced

Constraints

IdGradePath(s)DetailsRequirements
dom-2errorInvoiceIf the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources
: contained.contained.empty()
dom-3errorInvoiceIf the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource
: contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()
dom-4errorInvoiceIf a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a meta.versionId or a meta.lastUpdated
: contained.meta.versionId.empty() and contained.meta.lastUpdated.empty()
dom-5errorInvoiceIf a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label
: contained.meta.security.empty()
dom-6best practiceInvoiceA resource should have narrative for robust management
: text.`div`.exists()
dpi-17-1818warningInvoice.recipient430-9 > 340-.01: if patient then Patient
:
ele-1error**ALL** elementsAll FHIR elements must have a @value or children
: hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())
ext-1error**ALL** extensionsMust have either extensions or value[x], not both
: extension.exists() != value.exists()

This structure is derived from Invoice

Summary

Must-Support: 62 elements

Structures

This structure refers to these other structures:

  • Patient (http://va.gov/fhir/StructureDefinition/Patient)
  • Debt Portal Patient (http://va.gov/fhir/StructureDefinition/DebtPortalPatient)
  • Debt Portal ChargeItem[charges] (http://va.gov/fhir/StructureDefinition/DebtPortalChargeItemcharges)
  • Debt Portal ChargeItem[interest] (http://va.gov/fhir/StructureDefinition/DebtPortalChargeIteminterest)

Slices

This structure defines the following Slices:

  • The element 1 is sliced based on the value of Invoice.lineItem
  • The element 1 is sliced based on the value of Invoice.lineItem.chargeItem[x]
  • The element 1 is sliced based on the value of Invoice.lineItem.priceComponent
  • The element 1 is sliced based on the value of Invoice.totalPriceComponent

Key Elements View

NameFlagsCard.TypeDescription & Constraints
Invoice 0..* Invoice Invoice containing ChargeItems from an Account
dom-2: If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources
dom-3: If the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource
dom-4: If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a meta.versionId or a meta.lastUpdated
dom-5: If a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label
dom-6: A resource should have narrative for robust management
implicitRules ?!Σ 0..1 uri A set of rules under which this content was created

modifierExtension ?! 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored

ext-1: Must have either extensions or value[x], not both

status ?!SΣ 1..1 code draft | issued | balanced | cancelled | entered-in-error

subject SΣ 0..1 Reference(Patient) Recipient(s) of goods and services

recipient SΣC 0..1 Reference(Debt Portal Patient) Recipient of this invoice

issuer S 0..1 Reference(Organization) Issuing Organization of Invoice

Constraints

IdGradePath(s)DetailsRequirements
dom-2errorInvoiceIf the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources
: contained.contained.empty()
dom-3errorInvoiceIf the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource
: contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()
dom-4errorInvoiceIf a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a meta.versionId or a meta.lastUpdated
: contained.meta.versionId.empty() and contained.meta.lastUpdated.empty()
dom-5errorInvoiceIf a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label
: contained.meta.security.empty()
dom-6best practiceInvoiceA resource should have narrative for robust management
: text.`div`.exists()
dpi-17-1818warningInvoice.recipient430-9 > 340-.01: if patient then Patient
:
ele-1error**ALL** elementsAll FHIR elements must have a @value or children
: hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())
ext-1error**ALL** extensionsMust have either extensions or value[x], not both
: extension.exists() != value.exists()

Differential View

This structure is derived from Invoice

NameFlagsCard.TypeDescription & Constraints
Invoice 0..* Invoice Invoice containing ChargeItems from an Account
identifier S 0..* Identifier Business Identifier for item
status S 1..1 code draft | issued | balanced | cancelled | entered-in-error
Binding: ARBillStatus FHIR (required)
subject S 0..1 Reference(Patient) Recipient(s) of goods and services
recipient SC 0..1 Reference(Debt Portal Patient) Recipient of this invoice
dpi-17-1818: 430-9 > 340-.01: if patient then Patient
date S 0..1 dateTime Invoice date / posting date
issuer S 0..1 Reference(Organization) Issuing Organization of Invoice
Slices for lineItem 0..* BackboneElement Line items of this Invoice
Slice: Unordered, Open by value:$this

Slice: Unordered, Open by type:$this
chargeItem[x]:chargeItemReference S 0..1 Reference(Debt Portal ChargeItem[charges]) Reference to ChargeItem containing details of this line item or an inline billing code

NameFlagsCard.TypeDescription & Constraints
Invoice 0..* Invoice Invoice containing ChargeItems from an Account
id Σ 0..1 id Logical id of this artifact
meta Σ 0..1 Meta Metadata about the resource
implicitRules ?!Σ 0..1 uri A set of rules under which this content was created
language 0..1 code Language of the resource content
Binding: CommonLanguages (preferred): A human language.

Additional BindingsPurpose
AllLanguages Max Binding
text 0..1 Narrative Text summary of the resource, for human interpretation
contained 0..* Resource Contained, inline Resources
extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
modifierExtension ?! 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored
identifier SΣ 0..* Identifier Business Identifier for item
status ?!SΣ 1..1 code draft | issued | balanced | cancelled | entered-in-error
Binding: ARBillStatus FHIR (required)
cancelledReason 0..1 string Reason for cancellation of this Invoice
type Σ 0..1 CodeableConcept Type of Invoice
subject SΣ 0..1 Reference(Patient) Recipient(s) of goods and services
recipient SΣC 0..1 Reference(Debt Portal Patient) Recipient of this invoice

id 0..1 string Unique id for inter-element referencing

modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
role 0..1 CodeableConcept Type of involvement in creation of this Invoice
actor 1..1 Reference(Practitioner | Organization | Patient | PractitionerRole | Device | RelatedPerson) Individual who was involved
issuer S 0..1 Reference(Organization) Issuing Organization of Invoice
account 0..1 Reference(Account) Account that is being balanced

extension 0..* Extension Additional content defined by implementations
modifierExtension ?!Σ 0..* Extension Extensions that cannot be ignored even if unrecognized
type S 1..1 code base | surcharge | deduction | discount | tax | informational
Binding: InvoicePriceComponentType (required): Codes indicating the kind of the price component.

Constraints

IdGradePath(s)DetailsRequirements
dom-2errorInvoiceIf the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT contain nested Resources
: contained.contained.empty()
dom-3errorInvoiceIf the resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL be referred to from elsewhere in the resource or SHALL refer to the containing resource
: contained.where((('#'+id in (%resource.descendants().reference | %resource.descendants().as(canonical) | %resource.descendants().as(uri) | %resource.descendants().as(url))) or descendants().where(reference = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists() or descendants().where(as(canonical) = '#').exists()).not()).trace('unmatched', id).empty()
dom-4errorInvoiceIf a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a meta.versionId or a meta.lastUpdated
: contained.meta.versionId.empty() and contained.meta.lastUpdated.empty()
dom-5errorInvoiceIf a resource is contained in another resource, it SHALL NOT have a security label
: contained.meta.security.empty()
dom-6best practiceInvoiceA resource should have narrative for robust management
: text.`div`.exists()
dpi-17-1818warningInvoice.recipient430-9 > 340-.01: if patient then Patient
:
ele-1error**ALL** elementsAll FHIR elements must have a @value or children
: hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())
ext-1error**ALL** extensionsMust have either extensions or value[x], not both
: extension.exists() != value.exists()

This structure is derived from Invoice

Summary

Must-Support: 62 elements

Structures

This structure refers to these other structures:

  • Patient (http://va.gov/fhir/StructureDefinition/Patient)
  • Debt Portal Patient (http://va.gov/fhir/StructureDefinition/DebtPortalPatient)
  • Debt Portal ChargeItem[charges] (http://va.gov/fhir/StructureDefinition/DebtPortalChargeItemcharges)
  • Debt Portal ChargeItem[interest] (http://va.gov/fhir/StructureDefinition/DebtPortalChargeIteminterest)

Slices

This structure defines the following Slices:

  • The element 1 is sliced based on the value of Invoice.lineItem
  • The element 1 is sliced based on the value of Invoice.lineItem.chargeItem[x]
  • The element 1 is sliced based on the value of Invoice.lineItem.priceComponent
  • The element 1 is sliced based on the value of Invoice.totalPriceComponent

 

Other representations of profile: CSV, Excel, Schematron
